info.title: ERNIE API
info.description: REST API for ERNIE (Earth Research Notary for Information Editing) - A metadata editor for reviewers of research data at GFZ Helmholtz Centre for Geosciences. This API provides read-only access to metadata types and controlled vocabularies for integration with ELMO and other external systems.

tags.name: Editor Configuration
tags.description: Endpoints for retrieving metadata types and roles configuration used by external editors like ELMO

tags.name: Vocabularies
tags.description: Endpoints for accessing controlled vocabularies from NASA GCMD (Global Change Master Directory), PID registries (b2inst), and ROR (Research Organization Registry)

get.summary: List resource types enabled for ELMO
get.description: Returns all resource types that are enabled for ELMO. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

get.summary: List title types enabled for ELMO
get.description: Returns all title types that are enabled for ELMO. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

get.summary: List licenses enabled for ELMO
get.description: Returns all licenses that are enabled for ELMO. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

get.summary: List licenses enabled for ELMO filtered by resource type
get.description: Returns all licenses that are enabled for ELMO and available for the specified resource type. Licenses that have the resource type in their exclusion list will not be returned. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

parameters.name: resourceTypeSlug
parameters.description: The slug of the resource type (e.g., 'software', 'dataset', 'book-chapter')

200.description: List of licenses available for the resource type

example.name: GNU General Public License v3.0 or later

get.summary: List date types enabled for ELMO
get.description: Returns all date types that are enabled for ELMO. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

get.summary: List all description types
get.description: Returns all description types defined in the system, regardless of their activation status. No authentication required.

get.summary: List description types enabled for ELMO
get.description: Returns all description types that are enabled for ELMO (both `is_active` and `is_elmo_active` must be true). Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

200.description: List of description types enabled for ELMO

get.summary: List description types enabled for ERNIE
get.description: Returns all description types that are active for the ERNIE editor. No authentication required.

get.summary: List languages enabled for ELMO
get.description: Returns all languages that are enabled for ELMO. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

get.summary: List author roles active for ELMO
get.description: Returns all author roles that are active for ELMO. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

get.summary: List contributor person roles active for ELMO
get.description: Returns all contributor person roles that are active for ELMO. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

get.summary: List contributor institution roles active for ELMO
get.description: Returns all contributor institution roles that are active for ELMO. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

get.summary: List all relation types
get.description: Returns all DataCite relation types defined in the system, regardless of their activation status. No authentication required.

get.summary: List relation types enabled for ERNIE
get.description: Returns all relation types that are active for the ERNIE editor (`is_active` is true). No authentication required.

get.summary: List relation types enabled for ELMO
get.description: Returns all relation types that are enabled for ELMO (both `is_active` and `is_elmo_active` must be true). Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

200.description: List of relation types enabled for ELMO

get.summary: List all identifier types with patterns
get.description: Returns all DataCite identifier types defined in the system with their active validation and detection regex patterns. Only patterns that are currently active are included. No authentication required.

200.description: List of all identifier types with active patterns

get.summary: List identifier types enabled for ERNIE
get.description: Returns all identifier types that are active for the ERNIE editor (`is_active` is true) with their active patterns. No authentication required.

200.description: List of active identifier types with active patterns

get.summary: List identifier types enabled for ELMO
get.description: Returns all identifier types that are enabled for ELMO (both `is_active` and `is_elmo_active` must be true) with their active validation and detection regex patterns. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

200.description: List of identifier types enabled for ELMO with patterns

get.summary: Get GCMD Science Keywords vocabulary
get.description: Returns the complete GCMD (Global Change Master Directory) Science Keywords vocabulary as a hierarchical JSON structure. The vocabulary is loaded from NASA's KMS (Keyword Management System) API. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

error.example: Vocabulary file not found. Please run: php artisan get-gcmd-science-keywords

get.summary: Get GCMD Platforms vocabulary
get.description: Returns the complete GCMD (Global Change Master Directory) Platforms vocabulary as a hierarchical JSON structure. The vocabulary is loaded from NASA's KMS (Keyword Management System) API. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

error.example: Vocabulary file not found. Please run: php artisan get-gcmd-platforms

get.summary: Get GCMD Instruments vocabulary
get.description: Returns the complete GCMD (Global Change Master Directory) Instruments vocabulary as a hierarchical JSON structure. The vocabulary is loaded from NASA's KMS (Keyword Management System) API. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

error.example: Vocabulary file not found. Please run: php artisan get-gcmd-instruments

get.summary: Get ICS Chronostratigraphic Timescale vocabulary
get.description: Returns the International Chronostratigraphic Chart (ICS) as a hierarchical JSON structure. The vocabulary is loaded from the ARDC (Australian Research Data Commons) Linked Data API and contains geologic time intervals (eons, eras, periods, epochs, ages). Boundary and GSSP concepts are filtered out. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

404.description: Thesaurus is disabled or vocabulary file not found

error.example: Vocabulary file not found. Please run: php artisan get-chronostrat-timescale

get.summary: Get GEMET Thesaurus vocabulary
get.description: Returns the GEMET (GEneral Multilingual Environmental Thesaurus) as a hierarchical JSON structure. The vocabulary is loaded from the EIONET GEMET REST API and contains environmental concepts organized in SuperGroups, Groups, and Concepts. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

404.description: Thesaurus is disabled or vocabulary file not found

error.example: Vocabulary file not found. Please run: php artisan get-gemet-thesaurus

get.summary: Get Analytical Methods for Geochemistry vocabulary
get.description: Returns the 'Analytical Methods for Geochemistry and Cosmochemistry' vocabulary as a hierarchical JSON structure. The vocabulary is loaded from the ARDC (Australian Research Data Commons) Linked Data API and contains analytical methods (e.g., Mass Spectrometry, ICP-MS) with notation codes and definitions. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

404.description: Thesaurus is disabled or vocabulary file not found

error.example: Vocabulary file not found. Please run: php artisan get-analytical-methods

get.summary: Get PID4INST instruments vocabulary
get.description: Returns the complete PID4INST instruments vocabulary from b2inst (EUDAT instrument registry). Each instrument includes a persistent identifier (Handle PID), name, description, and additional metadata such as owners, manufacturers, instrument types, and measured variables. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

404.description: PID4INST is disabled or vocabulary file not found

get.summary: Check thesauri availability
get.description: Returns the availability status of all configured thesauri (e.g., GCMD Science Keywords, GCMD Platforms, GCMD Instruments, ICS Chronostratigraphic Chart). This endpoint does not require authentication and is intended for frontend configuration checks.

get.summary: Check PID registry availability
get.description: Returns the availability status of all configured PID registries (e.g., PID4INST, ROR). This endpoint does not require authentication and is intended for frontend configuration checks.

get.summary: Get ROR affiliations for ELMO
get.description: Returns the complete ROR (Research Organization Registry) data with metadata wrapper including total count and last update timestamp. Each entry includes the preferred label, ROR ID, and alternative labels/search terms. Provide the API key via the `X-API-Key` header.

404.description: ROR is disabled or data file not found

get.summary: Check thesauri availability for ELMO
get.description: Returns the availability status of all configured thesauri from the ELMO perspective (uses `is_elmo_active` flag). Requires API key authentication. For unauthenticated frontend checks, use `/api/v1/vocabularies/thesauri-availability` instead.

get.summary: Check PID registry availability for ELMO
get.description: Returns the availability status of all configured PID registries from the ELMO perspective (uses `is_elmo_active` flag). Requires API key authentication. For unauthenticated frontend checks, use `/api/v1/vocabularies/pid-availability` instead.

200.description: PID registry availability status for ELMO

ElmoApiKey.name: X-API-Key
ElmoApiKey.description: API key required to access ELMO-specific endpoints. Must be provided in the `X-API-Key` header. Query parameter authentication is not supported for security reasons. Contact the ERNIE team to obtain an API key.

UnauthorizedError.description: Authentication failed. Either the API key is invalid/missing, or the server has no API key configured.

message.description: Error message describing the authentication failure

notConfigured.summary: API key not configured on server

ElmoResourceType.description: A resource type configuration for ELMO editor

description.description: Official DataCite description for this resource type
description.example: Data encoded in a defined structure.

Role.description: A role that can be assigned to authors or contributors

TitleType.description: A title type for categorizing resource titles

DateType.description: A date type for categorizing resource dates according to DataCite schema

description.example: The date that the publisher accepted the resource into their system.

DescriptionType.description: A description type for categorizing resource descriptions according to DataCite schema 4.7

License.description: A license that can be applied to research data

Language.description: A language supported for dataset metadata

GcmdScienceKeywords.description: GCMD Science Keywords from NASA Knowledge Management System

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the vocabulary was last updated

data.description: Hierarchical array of GCMD Science Keywords

GcmdPlatforms.description: GCMD Platforms from NASA Knowledge Management System

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the vocabulary was last updated

GcmdInstruments.description: GCMD Instruments from NASA Knowledge Management System

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the vocabulary was last updated

ChronostratTimescale.description: ICS Chronostratigraphic Timescale from ARDC Linked Data API (International Chronostratigraphic Chart / Geologic Time Scale 2020)

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the vocabulary was last updated

data.description: Hierarchical array of chronostratigraphic intervals (Eons → Eras → Periods → Epochs → Ages)

GemetThesaurus.description: GEMET (GEneral Multilingual Environmental Thesaurus) from the EIONET REST API

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the vocabulary was last updated

data.description: Hierarchical array of GEMET concepts (SuperGroups → Groups → Concepts)

AnalyticalMethodsVocabulary.description: Analytical Methods for Geochemistry and Cosmochemistry vocabulary from the ARDC Linked Data API (EarthChem/GEOROC)

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the vocabulary was last updated

data.description: Hierarchical array of analytical method concepts with notation codes

AnalyticalMethodsConcept.description: A concept from the Analytical Methods for Geochemistry and Cosmochemistry vocabulary, extending the base keyword concept with a notation code

language.description: Language code of the concept label

scheme.example: Analytical Methods for Geochemistry and Cosmochemistry

notation.description: Notation code for the concept (e.g. a short identifier). Always present; empty string when no notation is defined in the vocabulary.

description.description: Definition or description of the concept
description.example: A technique used to determine the concentration of a specific metal element in a sample.

language.description: Language code of the concept label

description.description: Definition or description of the concept
description.example: any of various sciences, as geography, geology, or meteorology, that deal with the earth, its composition, or any of its changing aspects.

Pid4instInstruments.description: PID4INST instruments vocabulary from b2inst (EUDAT instrument registry)

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the vocabulary was last updated

total.description: Total number of instruments in the vocabulary

data.description: Array of instrument records from b2inst

Pid4instInstrument.description: A single instrument record from the b2inst PID registry. Fields are flattened from the original b2inst API response — nested objects are reduced to their name strings for simpler consumption.

pid.description: Persistent Identifier (Handle PID) of the instrument

name.description: Name or title of the instrument

description.description: Description of the instrument (empty string if not available)

landingPage.description: URL to the landing page of the instrument in b2inst (empty string if not available)

owners.description: Names of organizations or persons owning the instrument

manufacturers.description: Names of manufacturers of the instrument

model.description: Model name of the instrument, or null if not available

instrumentTypes.description: Classification type names of the instrument

ThesauriAvailability.description: Availability status of thesauri vocabularies, keyed by thesaurus type

PidAvailability.description: Availability status of PID registries, keyed by registry type

available.description: Whether this PID registry is enabled

displayName.description: Human-readable name of the PID registry

RorAffiliations.description: ROR affiliations data with metadata wrapper

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the data was last fetched

total.description: Total number of organizations in the dataset

prefLabel.description: Preferred display name of the organization
prefLabel.example: Helmholtz Centre Potsdam - GFZ German Research Centre for Geosciences

otherLabel.description: Alternative names, acronyms, and search terms

RelationType.description: A DataCite relationType value used for Related Identifiers (e.g. Cites, IsSupplementTo)

name.description: Human-readable name of the relation type

slug.description: Machine-readable slug matching the DataCite schema value

IdentifierType.description: A DataCite relatedIdentifierType value (e.g. DOI, URL, Handle) with optional validation and detection regex patterns

name.description: Human-readable name of the identifier type

slug.description: Machine-readable slug matching the DataCite schema value

patterns.description: Grouped regex patterns for this identifier type

validation.description: Regex patterns to validate whether a given string is a valid identifier of this type

detection.description: Regex patterns to auto-detect this identifier type from a raw input string

IdentifierTypePattern.description: A single regex pattern for validating or detecting an identifier type

priority.description: Priority for ordering patterns (higher = checked first)
